expectations.evidence: Response says 'how many people', 'unique users', 'active users' — never corrects to clients/profiles
Query uses `org_mozilla_firefox.baseline` — a raw ping table, not the aggregate
No app_name filter — table is channel-specific but doesn't cover all Android channels
Query has `DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE_SUB(...)` — a partition filter exists, though on the wrong table
